description: Configure a dynamic assessment in Moodle for the Pharmacology 101 (PHARM101) course using the admin credentials (username: admin, password: Admin1234!). Create a quiz named 'Weekly Interaction Check' with the description 'Practice your knowledge of drug-drug and drug-food interactions.' Set the grade to pass to 4.00 and allowed attempts to unlimited. The quiz must be configured to draw a random set of 5 shuffled questions from the 'Drug Interactions' question bank category for each attempt.
